meta.title: Sentinel Page Hero Banner — AI-watching POV
meta.usage_context: wide cinematic banner at the top of the Sentinel page, sits below the COMING SOON badge and above the title

subject.name: Dim home interior viewed through a security camera with subtle AI analysis overlay

physical_properties.scene_type: view from a security camera looking down a hallway or living room at night, slight wide-angle distortion at edges, suggesting the camera's lens character

foreground.notes: Four small corner brackets (L-shaped) drawn as a subtle AI overlay around a focus area (e.g. near a doorway or piece of furniture). Brackets are thin, glowing green (#22c55e), about 1-2 px stroke. Suggest 'object of interest detected'. Not too prominent — they are accents, not the main subject.
A faint horizontal scan line in soft purple (#a855f7), traveling across the frame — an AI analysis line. Very subtle, looks like a TV scanline or radar sweep. About 5-10% opacity.

midground.notes: Dim living room or hallway viewed from an upper corner / camera angle. Soft furniture silhouettes, a couch, a doorway, maybe a window letting in faint outdoor street light. Empty of people. Quiet. Slight grain/noise like a low-light camera sensor.

background.notes: Far end of the room fades to deep teal-black. A faint blue/orange glow suggests an outdoor street lamp through a distant window.

background.color: deep teal-black (#0a0a0f) with low-key cool ambient

atmosphere.mood: watchful, quiet, after-hours, AI-observing, technical, calm-but-alert

camera.notes: Camera POV — placed near the ceiling in a corner, looking diagonally across the room. Subtle wide-angle distortion at the corners adds 'security camera lens character' without being cartoonish.

lighting.notes: Almost ambient — a faint cool blue-teal wash from a distant window, just enough to define silhouettes. Sensor-noise grain over the whole image. The brightest visible elements are the green AI corner brackets and the purple scan line, which serve as the brand-color accents in an otherwise low-key scene.

controls.leave_negative_space: center — the title text will overlay near the top so keep the upper third visually quieter
controls.notes: Photorealistic camera-POV scene with minimalist AI overlay accents. Aspect ratio 21:9 — cinematic wide banner above the hero title. The whole image should read as 'this is what Sentinel sees, quietly, at 3am' — not 'this is a futuristic robot eye'.
